code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best_start = 0
  mut best_len = 0
  mut cur_start = 0
  mut cur_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if cur_len > best_len
        best_len = cur_len
        best_start = cur_start
      end
      cur_len = 0
      cur_start = i + 1
    else
      if cur_len == 0
        cur_start = i
      end
      cur_len = cur_len + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("longest=#{word}")
end
